summary: Block 3 testing completed: Product-specific bots, bot_config CRUD, QR scan_count. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Settings page working with inline bot config editor, QR campaigns show scan_count. One backend fix applied (bot-config endpoint now merges with defaults).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products returns 5 products (Bombro, Gomitas Melatonina, CBD Colageno, Pitch Up, Magnesio Citrato)
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/bot-config returns bot config with all fields (personality, key_benefits, usage_info, restrictions, faqs)
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/bot-config merges stored config with defaults
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/bot-config returns 404 for nonexistent product
Backend: PUT /api/products/{id}/bot-config updates bot config fields correctly
Backend: PUT /api/products/{id}/bot-config filters out invalid fields (only allows personality, key_benefits, usage_info, restrictions, faqs)
Backend: GET /api/qr-campaigns includes scan_count field on all campaigns
Backend: GET /api/qr-campaigns includes both scan_count and leads_count fields
Backend: build_product_bot_prompt function exists and generates product-specific prompts
Backend: Product CRUD with bot_config (create, update, delete) flow works
Backend: Bot config persistence verified via GET after PUT
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Productos y Bots' label for /settings nav
Frontend: Settings page (Productos y Bots) loads with title and description
Frontend: 5 product cards displayed on Settings page
Frontend: Each product card has 'Editar', 'Bot', and Delete buttons
Frontend: Clicking 'Bot' button expands inline bot config editor
Frontend: Bot config editor shows all 5 fields: Personalidad, Beneficios clave, Cómo se usa, Restricciones, Preguntas frecuentes
Frontend: 'Guardar Config del Bot' button visible in expanded editor
Frontend: Saving bot config shows success toast 'Configuración del bot actualizada'
Frontend: Bot config changes persist after save (verified values in form)
Frontend: QR Campaigns page shows scan_count as 'X escaneos' on each card
Frontend: QR campaign cards show both leads count and scan count
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 466-472: Fixed GET /api/products/{id}/bot-config to merge stored config with defaults)
seed_data_creation: Test product created and deleted during testing. Bot config updated for Bombro product during UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 3 features implemented: 1) GET/PUT /api/products/{id}/bot-config endpoints for product-specific bot configuration, 2) Each product has bot_config with 5 fields: personality, key_benefits, usage_info, restrictions, faqs, 3) build_product_bot_prompt() generates specialized prompts using bot_config, 4) scan_count field on QR campaigns incremented in detect_channel_from_message(), 5) Settings page renamed to 'Productos y Bots' with inline bot config editor. No cross-product contamination - each bot only knows about its specific product.
block3_completion_status: COMPLETE - All Block 3 features working correctly

backend_fix_applied.description: Fixed GET /api/products/{id}/bot-config to merge stored bot_config with default values instead of only returning stored partial config. This ensures the frontend always receives all 5 fields.
